<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Intervention\Gif\Blocks; use Intervention\Gif\AbstractExtension; class CommentExtension extends AbstractExtension { public const LABEL = "\xFE"; /** * Comment blocks * * @var array<string> */ protected array $comments = []; /** * Get all or one comment * * @return array<string> */ public function getComments(): array { return $this->comments; } /** * Get one comment by key */ public function getComment(int $key): mixed { return $this->comments[$key] ?? null; } /** * Set comment text */ public function addComment(string $value): self { $this->comments[] = $value; return $this; } }
